title: Alstom India Holdings Services is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Alstom India Holdings Services is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Alstom India Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Indore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Alstom India Holdings Services:
Alstom India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alstom India Holdings Services!
